title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is expanding AI adoption in development workflows, with Cursor reporting that high-adoption teams are deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster. PayPal projects it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 through AI-driven development acceleration.
